scope.summary: Delete the four dead metadata-gate retry tags v0.6.2-v0.6.5 from local and origin, leaving every published tag intact.
out_of_scope: Any tag that was actually published (v0.6.0, v0.6.1, v0.6.6 remain untouched).
Deleting GitHub Release objects: the bead's precondition was that none exist for these tags, which was re-verified before deletion.

entry_points.name: dead-tag precondition re-verified
entry_points.trace: gh release list showed no GitHub Release object attached to v0.6.2, v0.6.3, v0.6.4 or v0.6.5; the bead records only 0.6.0/0.6.1/0.6.6 were ever published. Operator approval to proceed was recorded in the bead description on 2026-07-21 before any deletion.

entry_points.name: deletion executed local + origin
entry_points.trace: git tag -d and git push origin :refs/tags/<tag> ran for all four tags; each reported deletion.

entry_points.name: published tags intact after deletion
entry_points.trace: git ls-remote --tags origin filtered to the v0.6.x line returned exactly v0.6.0, v0.6.1, v0.6.6 - the four dead tags absent, every published tag still present.

notes: Executed by the lead orchestrator, not an agent. RULE 1 satisfied: the operator gave explicit in-session approval for this specific deletion and it was recorded in the bead before execution.
